name: Visual Translate by Vozo
tagline: Localize video text overlays into any language without rebuilding your visuals from scratch.
problem: Businesses expanding into new markets must recreate video assets entirely when translating on-screen text, wasting significant time and design resources. Visual Translate automates the detection and translation of text within videos, preserving the original layout and visual style. This allows teams to scale localization across multiple languages without touching editing software.
useCases: Translate product demo videos for international market launches
Localize training and onboarding videos for global employee teams
Adapt social media video content for multilingual audiences
Convert marketing videos with text overlays into regional language variants
